# Table Test v0.2.2

This document tests **v0.2.2** table support.

## Simple Table

| Header 1 | Header 2 |
| :--- | :--- |
| Cell 1 | Cell 2 |
| Cell 3 | Cell 4 |

| Feature | Status | Note |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Bold** | ✅ | Works |
| *Italic* | ✅ | Works |
| `Code` | ✅ | Works |
| [Link](https://feishu.cn) | ✅ | Works |
